title: andropogon brachystachyus
intro: Andropogon brachystachyus, also known as East Indian thyme or black grama, is a species of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Andropogon brachystachyus include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin infections.
